Hero Page.HEADLINE: Your product, in safe hands. Across India.
Hero Page.SUBHEADLINE:
Temperature-controlled warehousing built for the most demanding products: from frozen food and dairy to pharma and seafood.
World-class infrastructure, WMS-enabled operations, and the certifications your supply chain requires.

Zone Temperature range Products.Frozen: -22°C to -18°C: Ice cream, frozen food, meat, seafood
Zone Temperature range Products.Chilled: 0°C to +4°C: Dairy, butter, imported fruits, bakery
Zone Temperature range Products.Ambient: +25°C to +35°C: Sauces, biscuits, ready-to-eat, milk powder

S2 Our facilities.HEADLINE: Strategically located. Built to the highest standards.
S2 Our facilities.BODY:
Crystal operates cold chain facilities across India, with locations in Kolkata, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, JNPT (Mumbai), Delhi, Mundra, Kochi, Vishakhapatnam, Dhulagarh, and more under development.
All facilities feature multiple temperature zones, WMS-enabled operations, and full power and refrigeration backup.
S2 Our facilities.Kolkata, Dhulagarh: State-of-the-art cold storage in West Bengal's primary food processing hub. Multiple temperature zones, 8 docks, blast freezing capability, and direct highway access.
S2 Our facilities.Bhubaneswar, Khurda: Odisha's most advanced cold storage facility, located in the food park. Multiple temperature zones, 10 docks, and full WMS operations.

S3 Facility features.WMS-enabled operations: Barcode-driven putaway and picking. Granular stock management and real-time inventory visibility.
S3 Facility features.Multiple temperature zones: Frozen, chilled, controlled ambient, and ambient: all under one roof.
S3 Facility features.100% power & refrigeration backup: Generator backup and redundant refrigeration systems. Your product stays cold, regardless.
S3 Facility features.Handling services: Loading, unloading, palletisation, wrapping, bulk-breaking, packing, kitting.
S3 Facility features.CCP monitoring: Automated monitoring of critical control points: product temperature, shelf life, store temperature.
S3 Facility features.24-hour security: CCTV surveillance, access control, and round-the-clock security.

S4 Certifications.BODY: FSSC 22000 · ISO 22000 · ISO 9001:2015 · FSSAI · MPEDA · Export Inspection Council · Bureau Veritas · NCCD · Dept. of Agriculture, West Bengal
S4 Certifications.CTA: Talk to us about your storage requirement
